basic_details.job_title: DMRC Project Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.job_type: Direct Recruitment /Deputation/ Post Retirement Contractual Engagement
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) has officially announced the Project Director Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 05 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of Direct Recruitment: Maximum 57 years, Deputation: Maximum 55 years, and PRCE: 55 to 62 years and hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent (full-time) with minimum 60% marks along with 18 years of Gazetted/Executive level experience can now submit their offline applications up to 26 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and app

age_limit.age_details: Direct Recruitment: Max 57 years; Deputation: Max 55 years; PRCE: Min 55 years & Max 62 years
age_limit.details: Direct Recruitment: Maximum 57 years Deputation: Maximum 55 years PRCE: Minimum 55 years and Maximum 62 years

qualification.details: Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent (full-time) with minimum 60% marks from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 18 years of Gazetted/Executive level service in Civil Engineering. IRSE / Ex-IRSE officer (Indian Railway Service of Engineers).

selection_process: Personal Interview Medical fitness examination (Executive/Technical category for Direct Recruitment & PRCE)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC Project Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMRC Project Director (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DMRC Project Director (Civil) recruitment is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Director (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent with at least 60% marks and have a minimum of 18 years of Gazetted/Executive level service in Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Project Director (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The age limit varies depending on the recruitment type: Max 57 years for Direct Recruitment, Max 55 years for Deputation, and Min 55 years & Max 62 years for PRCE.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Director (Civil) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 120000 to Rs. 280000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DMRC Project Director (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Director (Civil) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Personal Interview and a Medical fitness examination for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided above, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
